title: Cyclosorus striatus
taxonomy: Cyclosorus striatus is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a part of the order Polypodiales. This plant is a type of species of fern. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Cyclosorus. Cyclosorus striatus is native to certain regions of Asia. It is a relatively common species within its native range.
uses: Cyclosorus striatus is a type of fern known for its various medicinal uses. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
